entry.title: Cash discount in debit memo accounting document
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a debit memo created with reference to an invoice (f2). The product is eligible for a cash discount and hence in the debit memo condition type DCD2 is triggered (we use S/4HANA Public cloud and hence DCD2 instead of SKTO).

I noticed that in the accounting document generated for the debit memo, the line item details doesn't show the calculated cash discount amount. I can see cash discount base amount, payment terms, baseline date etc. But the discount amount itself is missing. 

If I check the accounting document of a debit memo without reference, the discount amount is available at line level along with all other details  

Is this standard behavior? Or am I missing anything here?

Any help is appreciated. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Project ID can be Automatic encoding base on project type?
entry.content:
Hi ALL,

In APP Project Control - Enterprise Projects , I create a project.

Project ID can be Automatic encoding base on project type? or base on Project Profile ?

entry.title: Extension wizard not working
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have gone through this video and configure all the steps mentioned here. Though I can see the create extension button but am not able to proceed as it showing some configurations are missing.

Can you please guide here

🟣 S/4HANA Extensions: Start Fast with the New Extensibility Wizard - YouTube

Can you please help on this?

Regards,

Priya

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: Unable to retrieve the Specialists who are not on Collection worklist
entry.content:
• Inability to retrieve the details of specialists who are not on the collection worklist.
  • The SAP Standard app "Supervise Collection Worklist" discards the specialist details who are not on the collection worklist and only provides open worklist item information.
  • A custom CDS View was created from the data source I_CollectionWorklistItem to show the specialists even if they are not on the collection worklist, but the issue persists.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

How to save a user-specific layout in the app Bill of Exchange List?

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD EDITION - Email Notification for Approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I've configured the below steps to achieve email notification for Credit Memo Process Approval Workflow, but still I'm not able to receive a email notification for the same. Please advice if I'm missing anything in here.

1. Created workflow rules for Credit Memo and also did Manage Teams and Responsibilities

2. Created a custom template using Maintain Email Template (Approval Request for Credit Memo Request SD_SLS_CMR_APPROVAL_EMAIL_TMPL)

3. Configured Sender Email Address

4. Changed the settings in Output Parameter Determination.

Still I'm not receiving an email after the creation of Credit Memo. 

Please advice.

Thanks,

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: ABAP Development in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are considering building an S/4HANA for our own learning purposes.
The purpose is to use it to learn and verify each function of S/4HANA and its extensions.

We are considering which of the three environments to choose: ① S/4HANA (on-premise), ② S/4HANA Cloud Public edition, or ③ S/4HANA Cloud Private edition.

So, I would like to ask the following questions.
If I purchase the S/4HANA Cloud Public edition, is it possible to do side-by-side development using ABAP?

Also, is it possible to learn and verify development methods with the S/4HANA Cloud Public edition, which is a non-commercial license available to SAP partners?

Best regards,
Yuito

entry.title: Differences between S/4HANA Cloud PrivateEdition and Public Edition
entry.content:
Differences between S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and Public Edition

What is the most effective way to check the differences between S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

▪Things to check
・Differences in available modules
・Scope
・Limitations
・How to extend

Best regards,
YO-YO

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to run Forecasting in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am trying to set-up a forecasting based planning for trading goods that are defined as finished goods in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

I would like to have the reorder point automatically calculated by forecasting, adopt the proposed order point as the result of forecasting run, and update the reorder point in the MRP1 view.
We would like to know how to execute forecasting to achieve this.

Best regards and thanks,
Yasunori SHIBATA

entry.title: Attaching Links in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Can you please advise what are the options for attachment of links to external documents from the customer's server in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and if any cost involved. 

The idea of the customer is not to have to archive all documents as attachments in the system and to use external storage instead.

Many thanks,

Stella

entry.title: Embedded Images in Print Forms in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Does anyone know if it is possible to have embedded images in Print Forms, e.g. to include pictures of a defect item in a Quality Inspection Report?

Many thanks,

Stella

entry.title: Integration SAP DRC (cloud edition) with SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management
entry.content:
We just had a call with SAP regarding the integration of SAP Document and Reporting Compliance  with SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management .

During the call, SAP confirmed that it is not possible to connect SAP DRC to both SAP S/4 for outgoing invoices and SAP CIM for incoming invoices.

Desired Scenario: Our goal was to achieve a setup where SAP DRC could handle both outgoing and incoming invoices as described.

 

Why it doesn’t work: SAP DRC only allows one destination to be maintained per participant.So either you root the Invoice to the S/4 directly or to CIM. Once you root the invoice to CIM. You are no longer able to send an invoice from S/4 since the destination for the Participant is set to CIM. 

Users in S/4 need to have access to the CIM App for PDF Invoices and "Manage Electronic Documents"-App for E-Invoices.

Anyone else faced this limitation or found a solution?

 

Best regards

Sergen

entry.title: Grow with Premium SAP Managed Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We got to know that in GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, premium licenses, client is entitled for only one Sales cloud V2 tenant and SAP will do end to end integration with SAP S/4 Hana public cloud. 

We have below 2 questions.

1. Will SAP do the integration twice with SAP S/4HANA public cloud, once with quality and once with production system of SAP S/4Hana public cloud with sales cloud v2 single tenant?

2. If SAP do integration only once, then will SAP do the refresh activity once UAT is done in sales cloud V2? 

Please help to understand the process.

Thanks,

Ravi

entry.title: How to change the default currency for aging analysis?
entry.content:
The aging analysis apps have the default currency set to EUR. The requirement is to set the default currency to USD. Is there any way to change the default currency?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Mass changes to PO line item: supplier commit date
entry.content:
It is necessary to batch modify the delivery dates in the orders based on the supplier commit date provided by the vendor. Is there currently a way in the system to make bulk modifications, and after making changes, will I be able to see the time of each modification and check them, ensuring that the previous dates are not overwritten?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Include Specific Updates in Purchase Order Notifications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content: I created a situation type on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud system that sends notifications to customers when a purchase order is updated. However, my boss suggested that it would be great if customers could know which specific section or part of the purchase order has been updated in the notification. I’m not sure how to implement this, and I would appreciate any guidance.

entry.title: Report for Credit Risk Based impairment // SAP CLOUD PUBLIC EDITION
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am currently in the Explore Phase of a SAP Cloud PE Project. The customer wants to valuate the open customer positions. Due to some features the advanced valuation has, we want to go with it instead of the classic valuation. 

Now we want to valuate the "Doubtful account valuation". For the valuation you use the further valuations App in the classic valuation. For Advanced valuation you use the credit risk based impairment (GL- JOB). The Revaluation of the Customer positions does work in the Job log. Now we want to analyze the valuation and the "allowance" per debitor. In the Classic valuation this is possible with the Doublful Account Valuation APP. Here you can see the open Positions per Customer on a ovedue- interval grid and the accumulated allowance as well as the percentage (allowance/OP). 

Sadly the "Allowance" Field is connected to the results of the "further valuations" App and the there used  valuation method 3. So my allowance, calculated in the GL Job is not displayed here: 

I definetly need a report that shows me the Open Positions of a customer per overdue- interval grid as well as the accumulated allowance amount per customer (Idealy also per document). Is there any Standard way of getting the same report with the advanced valuation as I can get with the classic valuation? 

If not, can I copy the Doubtful Accounts Valuation App and extend the report with a value field of the accumulated allowance amount? 

 

Otherwise, is it recommendable to use the classic valuation approach instead? We have no problem with that, but heard, that it might run out of SAP Support in the near/middle future? 

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: External ID field in Inbound delivery to be made mandatory during Inbound delivery creation
